findings.evidence: The PDF contains a flowchart diagram in Appendix B showing the hierarchical relationship between Record Types (1 to 9). This diagram is completely absent in the corresponding HTML conversion.

findings.description: The hierarchical flowchart diagram in Appendix B was converted into sequential text paragraphs, losing the visual structure and connecting lines, though the structural relationships are still described in the subsequent text.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 4 contains a flowchart diagram. The HTML extracts the text from the diagram's boxes into sequential

tags (e.g., '

Environmental Data
Record Type 1

') without preserving the visual tree structure.
